overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia traversing a dense temperate forest during golden hour. The character walks through varied terrain including tall grass meadows, rocky inclines, and fern-covered forest floors, encountering a bear in the misty woods.

scene_state.functional_zone: temperate forest trail with golden tall grass

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through sunlit forest with tall grass, two swords visible on his back

entered.detail: Dense cluster of tall pine trees forming the forest canopy
Tall golden-brown grass lining the forest path
Large tree trunk covered in green moss
Rocky mountain peaks visible through the trees in the distance

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a sunlit forest trail surrounded by tall golden grass and dense pine trees. The morning light filters through the canopy creating long shadows on the dirt path, with rocky mountains visible in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest incline with moss-covered boulders

events.description: begins ascending rocky incline on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt climbing up mossy rocks and boulders on the forest hillside

entered.detail: Large moss-covered rock formation on the left side of the path
Prominent boulder blocking part of the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The terrain shifts to a rocky incline as Geralt climbs over moss-covered boulders. The golden grass gives way to gravel and stone, with the forest canopy still visible overhead as the character ascends the hillside.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty forest clearing with dense fern undergrowth

events.description: mist becomes visible in the background creating atmospheric depth
encounters a black bear standing on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through misty forest section and slowing as he spots a bear ahead

notable_agents.action: black bear standing alert on the forest path, facing the character

entered.detail: Fog and mist visible between the trees in the distance creating atmospheric depth
Thick patches of green and brown ferns covering the forest floor
Large black bear standing on all fours among the trees

segments.scene_description: Geralt descends back to the forest floor where mist hangs between the trees in the distance. The ground is covered in dense ferns, and a large black bear appears on the right side of the path, standing alert as the character approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense old-growth forest with thick fern undergrowth

events.description: enters darker section of forest with denser canopy cover

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing through shaded forest with thick vegetation, moving past the bear

entered.detail: Massive old tree trunk with rough bark texture
Dense carpet of ferns and underbrush covering the forest floor

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the woods, the canopy thickens and the lighting becomes more diffused and shadowed. Geralt walks past ancient tree trunks and through thick fern undergrowth, leaving the misty area and bear behind as the forest becomes denser.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit forest trail that gradually transitions into a dense, shadowed woodland. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path surrounded by tall golden grass and pine trees, with morning light filtering through the canopy toward distant rocky mountains. As the terrain shifts, the camera follows the character up a rocky incline over moss-covered boulders where the grass gives way to gravel and stone. The scene then descends back to a fern-covered forest floor where mist hangs between the trees and a large black bear appears alert on the right side of the path. Finally, the camera moves deeper into the woods as the canopy thickens and the lighting becomes more diffused, passing ancient tree trunks and thick undergrowth as the misty clearing is left behind.
